name: github_list_user_copilot_space_collaborators
description: List collaborators for a user Copilot Space (GET /users/{username}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators). Returns collaborators array. Classic tokens need user scope. See [List collaborators for a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/collaborators?apiVersio
